name: Unique Veterinary Prescription Diet Adult Dog Gastro Intestinal Chicken & Rice 3kg
shortDescription: Formulated for dogs to support the treatment of acute and chronic intestinal syndrome. It is also used to relieve absorption problems and cure diarrhoea. It helps in the treatment of stomach problems and promotes skin and coat health.
description: How it works: Content rich in probiotics and prebiotics, Quality and hydrolyzed protein source, Blueberry (antioxidant and fiber source), Rich fiber content (healthy digestion), Wild sea buckthorn (Omega-7 and anti-inflammatory), Digestive system microbiota useful content. Ingredients: Chicken Protein, Brown Rice, Pea, Hydrolyzed Chicken Protein, Sugar Beet Pulp, Chicken Fat, Corn Gluten Meal, Dried Egg, Anchovy Oil, Brewer's Yeast, Vitamin and Mineral Premix, Natural Flavors, Probiotic, Psyllium Shells, Blueberry, Dried Algae, MOS, ?-Glucan, Tocopherol, Yucca, Wild Seaweed. Raw Material Components Raw Protein 25.77% Raw oil 13.44% Raw Cellulose (Fiber) 3.78% Ash 5.07% Moisture 3.24% Omega 3 0.82% Omega 6 2.93% Calcium 0.86% Phosphorus 0.56% Sodium 0.38% Magnesium 0.09% Potassium 0.50% Nutritional Supplements Vitamin A (3a672a) 22.000 IU/kg Vitamin D 3 (E671) 1,000 IU/kg Vitamin E (3a700) 1.000 mg/kg Vitamin C (3a312) 500mg/kg Choline Chloride (3a890) 2.300 mg/kg Biotin (3a880) 2.4 mg/kg Vitamin B 1 (3a821) 11mg/kg Vitamin B2 14mg/kg Niacinamide (3a315) 94mg/kg Calcium-D-Panthothenate (3a841) 25mg/kg Vitamin B 6 (3a831) 7mg/kg Folic Acid (3a316) 2.4 mg/kg Vitamin B 12 0.16 mg/kg Zinc Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (3b606) 140mg/kg Ferrous Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (E1) 65mg/kg Manganese Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (E5) 75mg/kg Potassium Iodide (3b201) 4.2mg/kg Cupric Chelate of Amino Acids Hydrate (E4) 5mg/kg Organic Form of Selenium (3b8.10) 0.2mg/kg L-Carnitine (3a910) 300mg/kg Probiotic (B. Amyloliquefaciens) 7 x 10 14 /kg
